sentences.sentence: The disappointing results of many conventional road transport projects in Africa led some experts to rethink the strategy by which rural transport problems were to be tackled at the beginning of the 1980s.
sentences.translation: 非洲许多常规公路运输项目令人失望的结果，促使一些专家在20世纪80年代初重新思考应如何解决农村运输问题。

structure.text: The disappointing results of many conventional road transport projects in Africa
led some experts to rethink the strategy
by which rural transport problems were to be tackled

difficult_points: lead sb. to do 表示促使某人做某事。
by which 修饰 strategy，说明通过哪种策略解决问题。

sentences.sentence: A request for help in improving the availability of transport within the remote Makete District of south-western Tanzania presented the opportunity to try a new approach.
sentences.translation: 一项改善坦桑尼亚西南部偏远马凯特区交通可得性的援助请求，提供了尝试新方法的机会。

structure.text: A request for help in improving the availability of transport within the remote Makete District of south-western Tanzania
the opportunity to try a new approach

difficult_points: for help in improving... 中 in 后接动名词，说明援助的内容。
to try... 后置修饰 opportunity，说明机会是什么。

sentences.sentence: The concept of 'integrated rural transport' was adopted in the task of examining the transport needs of the rural households in the district.
sentences.translation: 在考察该区农村家庭运输需求的工作中，采用了“综合农村运输”的理念。

structure.text: in the task of examining the transport needs of the rural households in the district

difficult_points: was adopted 是被动语态，突出理念被采用。
of examining... 修饰 task，说明任务内容。

sentences.sentence: The objective was to reduce the time and effort needed to obtain access to essential goods and services through an improved rural transport system.
sentences.translation: 目标是通过改进农村运输系统，减少获得基本商品和服务所需的时间与精力。

structure.text: to reduce the time and effort
needed to obtain access to essential goods and services
through an improved rural transport system

difficult_points: to reduce... 作表语，说明目标。
needed... 修饰 time and effort，to obtain... 说明所需时间和精力是为了什么。

sentences.sentence: The underlying assumption was that the time saved would be used instead for activities that would improve the social and economic development of the communities.
sentences.translation: 其基本假设是，节省下来的时间会转而用于改善社区社会和经济发展的活动。

structure.text: that the time saved would be used instead for activities
that would improve the social and economic development of the communities

difficult_points: time saved 是过去分词短语，表示被节省的时间。
第二个 that 修饰 activities；would 表示假设中的预期结果。

sentences.sentence: The Makete Integrated Rural Transport Project (MIRTP) started in 1985 with financial support from the Swiss Development Corporation and was co-ordinated with the help of the Tanzanian government.
sentences.translation: 马凯特综合农村运输项目于1985年启动，得到瑞士发展公司的资金支持，并在坦桑尼亚政府协助下协调开展。

structure.text: The Makete Integrated Rural Transport Project (MIRTP)
with financial support from the Swiss Development Corporation
was co-ordinated with the help of the Tanzanian government

difficult_points: with 引出项目启动时的资金支持。
was co-ordinated 是被动语态，with the help of 表示在……帮助下。

sentences.sentence: When the project began, Makete District was virtually totally isolated during the rainy season.
sentences.translation: 项目开始时，马凯特区在雨季几乎完全与外界隔绝。
difficult_points: When 引导时间状语从句。
virtually 加强 totally 的程度，表示“几乎完全”。

sentences.sentence: The regional road was in such bad shape that access to the main towns was impossible for about three months of the year.
sentences.translation: 地区公路状况极差，以至于每年约有三个月无法到达主要城镇。

structure.text: that access to the main towns was impossible for about three months of the year

difficult_points: such...that... 表示“如此……以至于……”。
access to... 是名词短语，指通往城镇的通达条件。

sentences.sentence: Road traffic was extremely rare within the district, and alternative means of transport were restricted to donkeys in the north of the district.
sentences.translation: 区内公路交通极为罕见，替代交通工具仅限于该区北部的驴。

structure.text: alternative means of transport were restricted to donkeys in the north of the district

difficult_points: and 连接两个完整分句。
be restricted to 表示“仅限于”。

sentences.sentence: People relied primarily on the paths, which were slippery and dangerous during the rains.
sentences.translation: 人们主要依赖小路，而雨季时这些小路湿滑又危险。

structure.text: which were slippery and dangerous during the rains

difficult_points: rely on 表示依赖。
which 指 paths，说明其在雨季的状态。

sentences.sentence: Before solutions could be proposed, the problems had to be understood.
sentences.translation: 在提出解决方案之前，必须先理解问题。
difficult_points: Before 引导时间条件。
could be proposed 与 had to be understood 都是情态动词被动结构。

sentences.sentence: Little was known about the transport demands of the rural households, so Phase I, between December 1985 and December 1987, focused on research.
sentences.translation: 人们对农村家庭的运输需求知之甚少，因此1985年12月至1987年12月的第一阶段聚焦于研究。

structure.text: about the transport demands of the rural households
Phase I, between December 1985 and December 1987, focused on research

difficult_points: Little 位于主语位置，表示“很少的信息”。
between... 是 Phase I 的插入时间说明。

sentences.sentence: The socio-economic survey of more than 400 households in the district indicated that a household in Makete spent, on average, seven hours a day on transporting themselves and their goods, a figure which seemed extreme but which has also been obtained in surveys in other rural areas in Africa.
sentences.translation: 对该区400多个家庭的社会经济调查显示，马凯特一个家庭平均每天花七小时运输自己和货物；这个数字看似极端，但在非洲其他农村地区的调查中也得出过。

structure.text: The socio-economic survey of more than 400 households in the district
that a household in Makete spent, on average, seven hours a day on transporting themselves and their goods
a figure which seemed extreme but which has also been obtained in surveys in other rural areas in Africa

difficult_points: on average 是插入状语，表示平均而言。
a figure 与前面的 seven hours 同位；两个 which 分别说明该数字的评价和来源。

sentences.sentence: Interesting facts regarding transport were found: 95% was on foot; 80% was within the locality; and 70% was related to the collection of water and firewood and travelling to grinding mills.
sentences.translation: 调查发现了一些有趣的运输事实：95%靠步行；80%在本地范围内；70%与取水、拾柴和前往磨坊有关。

structure.text: 70% was related to the collection of water and firewood and travelling to grinding mills

difficult_points: 冒号和分号后的分句逐项解释调查结果。
be related to 后接并列名词/动名词，表示与……有关。

sentences.sentence: Having determined the main transport needs, possible solutions were identified which might reduce the time and burden.
sentences.translation: 在确定主要运输需求后，人们找出了可能减少时间和负担的方案。

structure.text: Having determined the main transport needs
which might reduce the time and burden

difficult_points: Having determined 表示先完成确定需求，再进行后面的识别。
which 修饰 possible solutions，might 表示可能效果。

sentences.sentence: During Phase II, from January to February 1991, a number of approaches were implemented in an effort to improve mobility and access to transport.
sentences.translation: 在1991年1月至2月的第二阶段，为改善流动性和交通可得性，实施了多种措施。

structure.text: During Phase II, from January to February 1991
in an effort to improve mobility and access to transport

difficult_points: from...to... 补充说明 Phase II 的时间。
in an effort to 表示“为了努力实现……”。

sentences.sentence: An improvement of the road network was considered necessary to ensure the import and export of goods to the district.
sentences.translation: 改善道路网络被认为是必要的，以确保该区货物的进出口。

structure.text: An improvement of the road network
to ensure the import and export of goods to the district

difficult_points: consider + 宾语 + 形容词的被动形式表示“被认为是……”。
to ensure... 表示改善道路的目的。

sentences.sentence: These improvements were carried out using methods that were heavily dependent on labour.
sentences.translation: 这些改进采用高度依赖劳动力的方法来实施。

structure.text: that were heavily dependent on labour

difficult_points: using... 说明实施时所用方式。
that 修饰 methods，be dependent on 表示依赖。

sentences.sentence: In addition to the improvement of roads, these methods provided training in the operation of a mechanical workshop and bus and truck services.
sentences.translation: 除改善道路外，这些方法还提供了机械车间、公共汽车和卡车服务运营方面的培训。

structure.text: In addition to the improvement of roads
training in the operation of a mechanical workshop and bus and truck services

difficult_points: In addition to 后接名词短语，表示“除……之外”。
in the operation of... 修饰 training，说明培训内容。

sentences.sentence: However, the difference from the conventional approach was that this time consideration was given to local transport needs outside the road network.
sentences.translation: 但与常规方法不同的是，这次考虑了道路网络之外的本地运输需求。

structure.text: the difference from the conventional approach
that this time consideration was given to local transport needs outside the road network

difficult_points: that 从句作表语，具体说明差异。
consideration was given to 是被动表达，表示“给予考虑”。

sentences.sentence: Most goods were transported along the paths that provide short-cuts up and down the hillsides, but the paths were a real safety risk and made the journey on foot even more arduous.
sentences.translation: 大多数货物沿着提供山坡上下捷径的小路运输，但这些小路是真正的安全隐患，也使步行更加艰难。

structure.text: that provide short-cuts up and down the hillsides
the paths were a real safety risk and made the journey on foot even more arduous

difficult_points: that 修饰 paths，说明这些路径提供捷径。
make + 宾语 + 形容词表示“使步行更艰难”。

sentences.sentence: It made sense to improve the paths by building steps, handrails and footbridges.
sentences.translation: 通过修建台阶、扶手和人行桥来改善小路是合理的。

structure.text: by building steps, handrails and footbridges

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，真正内容是 to improve...。
by 后接动名词 building，说明改善方式。

sentences.sentence: It was uncommon to find means of transport that were more efficient than walking but less technologically advanced than motor vehicles.
sentences.translation: 很少能找到比步行效率更高、但技术又不如机动车先进的交通工具。

structure.text: that were more efficient than walking but less technologically advanced than motor vehicles

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，to find... 是真正主语。
that 修饰 means of transport，含两个并列比较结构。

sentences.sentence: The use of bicycles was constrained by their high cost and the lack of available spare parts.
sentences.translation: 自行车的使用受到其高成本和缺乏可用备件的限制。

structure.text: by their high cost and the lack of available spare parts

difficult_points: was constrained by 表示受到……限制。
available 修饰 spare parts，the lack of 表示缺乏。

sentences.sentence: Oxen were not used at all but donkeys were used by a few households in the northern part of the district.
sentences.translation: 牛完全没有被使用，但该区北部少数家庭会使用驴。

structure.text: donkeys were used by a few households in the northern part of the district

difficult_points: at all 与否定连用，表示“完全不”。
but 连接两个对比的被动分句。

sentences.sentence: MIRTP focused on what would be most appropriate for the inhabitants of Makete in terms of what was available, how much they could afford and what they were willing to accept.
sentences.translation: 该项目关注的是：就可获得的资源、他们负担得起多少以及他们愿意接受什么而言，什么最适合马凯特居民。

structure.text: what would be most appropriate for the inhabitants of Makete
in terms of what was available, how much they could afford and what they were willing to accept

difficult_points: what 从句作 focused on 的宾语。
in terms of 后接三个并列的间接疑问从句，分别考察资源、支付能力和接受度。

sentences.sentence: After careful consideration, the project chose the promotion of donkeys - a donkey costs less than a bicycle - and the introduction of a locally manufacturable wheelbarrow.
sentences.translation: 经过慎重考虑，项目选择推广驴——一头驴比一辆自行车便宜——并引进一种可在当地制造的独轮车。

structure.text: a donkey costs less than a bicycle
the introduction of a locally manufacturable wheelbarrow

difficult_points: 破折号中是解释推广驴的理由的完整分句。
locally manufacturable 是复合形容词，修饰 wheelbarrow。

sentences.sentence: At the end of Phase II, it was clear that the selected approaches to Makete's transport problems had had different degrees of success.
sentences.translation: 在第二阶段结束时，很明显，针对马凯特运输问题所选的方法取得了不同程度的成功。

structure.text: At the end of Phase II
that the selected approaches to Makete's transport problems had had different degrees of success

difficult_points: it 是形式主语，that 从句才是实际内容。
had had 是过去完成时，表示到第二阶段结束前已经取得的结果。

sentences.sentence: Phase III, from March 1991 to March 1993, focused on the refinement and institutionalisation of these activities.
sentences.translation: 1991年3月至1993年3月的第三阶段聚焦于完善这些活动并使其制度化。

structure.text: Phase III, from March 1991 to March 1993
the refinement and institutionalisation of these activities

difficult_points: from...to... 是对 Phase III 的插入时间说明。
refinement 和 institutionalisation 并列，均为抽象名词。

sentences.sentence: The road improvements and accompanying maintenance system had helped make the district centre accessible throughout the year.
sentences.translation: 道路改进及配套维护系统已帮助让区中心全年都可到达。

structure.text: The road improvements and accompanying maintenance system

difficult_points: had helped 表示在某个过去时间前已产生帮助。
make + 宾语 + 形容词表示“使……变得可到达”。

sentences.sentence: Essential goods from outside the district had become more readily available at the market, and prices did not fluctuate as much as they had done before.
sentences.translation: 区外的必需品在市场上变得更容易获得，价格的波动也不像以前那么大。

structure.text: Essential goods from outside the district
prices did not fluctuate as much as they had done before

difficult_points: more readily available 是比较级，表示更容易获得。
as much as 表示与过去相比的同等程度；had done 代替 had fluctuated。

sentences.sentence: Paths and secondary roads were improved only at the request of communities who were willing to participate in construction and maintenance.
sentences.translation: 小路和次级道路只会应愿意参与建设和维护的社区请求而改善。

structure.text: only at the request of communities
who were willing to participate in construction and maintenance

difficult_points: only at the request of 表示“仅应……请求”。
who 修饰 communities，be willing to 表示愿意。

sentences.sentence: However, the improved paths impressed the inhabitants, and requests for assistance greatly increased soon after only a few improvements had been completed.
sentences.translation: 然而，改善后的小路给居民留下深刻印象，仅完成少数改进后不久，求助请求就大幅增加。

structure.text: requests for assistance greatly increased soon after only a few improvements had been completed

difficult_points: impress sb. 表示给某人留下深刻印象。
soon after 后接过去完成时，表示少数改进完成之后不久。

sentences.sentence: The efforts to improve the efficiency of the existing transport services were not very successful because most of the motorised vehicles in the district broke down and there were no resources to repair them.
sentences.translation: 改善现有运输服务效率的努力并不十分成功，因为区内大多数机动车都坏了，也没有资源修理它们。

structure.text: The efforts to improve the efficiency of the existing transport services
because most of the motorised vehicles in the district broke down
there were no resources to repair them

difficult_points: to improve... 修饰 efforts，说明努力目标。
break down 表示机器出故障；them 指 motorised vehicles。

sentences.sentence: Even the introduction of low-cost means of transport was difficult because of the general poverty of the district.
sentences.translation: 由于该区普遍贫困，即便引进低成本交通工具也很困难。

structure.text: Even the introduction of low-cost means of transport
because of the general poverty of the district

difficult_points: Even 强调连这一最低限度的做法也困难。
because of 后接名词短语说明原因。

sentences.sentence: The locally manufactured wheelbarrows were still too expensive for all but a few of the households.
sentences.translation: 当地制造的独轮车对除了少数家庭以外的所有家庭来说仍然太贵。

structure.text: for all but a few of the households

difficult_points: locally manufactured 是过去分词短语，修饰 wheelbarrows。
all but a few 表示“除少数之外的所有”。

sentences.sentence: Modifications to the original design by local carpenters cut production time and costs.
sentences.translation: 当地木匠对原设计作出的修改缩短了生产时间并降低了成本。

structure.text: Modifications to the original design by local carpenters

difficult_points: to the original design 修饰 Modifications，by local carpenters 表示修改者。
cut 在这里意为缩短、降低。

sentences.sentence: Other local carpenters have been trained in the new design so that they can respond to requests.
sentences.translation: 其他当地木匠已经接受新设计培训，从而能够回应需求。

structure.text: so that they can respond to requests

difficult_points: have been trained 是现在完成时被动，表示培训已完成且效果延续至今。
so that 引导目的或结果从句。

sentences.sentence: Nevertheless, a locally produced wooden wheelbarrow which costs around 5000 Tanzanian shillings (less than US$20) in Makete, and is about one quarter the cost of a metal wheelbarrow, is still too expensive for most people.
sentences.translation: 尽管如此，在马凯特一辆当地生产的木制独轮车售价约5000坦桑尼亚先令（不足20美元），约为金属独轮车价格的四分之一，但对大多数人来说仍然太贵。

structure.text: which costs around 5000 Tanzanian shillings (less than US$20) in Makete, and is about one quarter the cost of a metal wheelbarrow
still too expensive for most people

difficult_points: which 修饰 wheelbarrow，内部并列 costs 和 is 两个谓语。
one quarter the cost of... 是比例表达，表示价格是其四分之一。

sentences.sentence: Donkeys, which were imported to the district, have become more common and contribute, in particular, to the transportation of crops and goods to market.
sentences.translation: 被引入该区的驴已变得更常见，尤其有助于把农作物和货物运往市场。

structure.text: which were imported to the district
contribute, in particular, to the transportation of crops and goods to market

difficult_points: which 指 Donkeys，补充其来源。
have become 表示从过去至今的变化；in particular 是插入状语。

sentences.sentence: Those who have bought donkeys are mainly from richer households but, with an increased supply through local breeding, donkeys should become more affordable.
sentences.translation: 购买驴的人主要来自较富裕家庭，但随着通过当地繁殖增加供应，驴应会变得更容易负担。

structure.text: with an increased supply through local breeding

difficult_points: Those who... 指“那些……的人”，who 从句修饰 Those。
with 引出条件背景，should 表示预期。

sentences.sentence: Meanwhile, local initiatives are promoting the renting out of the existing donkeys.
sentences.translation: 与此同时，当地举措正在推动出租现有的驴。

structure.text: the renting out of the existing donkeys

difficult_points: are promoting 表示当前正在推进。
renting out 是动名词短语，表示出租。

sentences.sentence: It should be noted, however, that a donkey, which at 20,000 Tanzanian shillings costs less than a bicycle, is still an investment equal to an average household's income over half a year.
sentences.translation: 然而，应当指出的是，一头驴虽售价2万坦桑尼亚先令、比自行车便宜，仍相当于一个普通家庭半年的收入。

structure.text: that a donkey, which at 20,000 Tanzanian shillings costs less than a bicycle, is still an investment equal to an average household's income over half a year

difficult_points: It should be noted 是正式的被动表达，意为“应当注意”。
which 修饰 donkey；equal to 表示相当于。

sentences.sentence: This clearly illustrates the need for supplementary measures if one wants to assist the rural poor.
sentences.translation: 这清楚表明，如果要帮助农村贫困人口，就需要补充措施。

structure.text: if one wants to assist the rural poor

difficult_points: This 指前面一头驴仍很昂贵这一事实。
if 引导条件从句，one 是泛指“人们”。

sentences.sentence: It would have been easy to criticise the MIRTP for using in the early phases a 'top-down' approach, in which decisions were made by experts and officials before being handed down to communities, but it was necessary to start the process from the level of the governmental authorities of the district.
sentences.translation: 很容易批评该项目早期采用“自上而下”的方法——即专家和官员先作决定，再把决定下达到社区——但从地区政府当局层面启动这一过程是必要的。

structure.text: to criticise the MIRTP for using in the early phases a 'top-down' approach
in which decisions were made by experts and officials before being handed down to communities
it was necessary to start the process from the level of the governmental authorities of the district

difficult_points: would have been 表示对过去的评价；It 是形式主语。
in which 修饰 approach，being handed down 是被动动名词，表示决定被下达。

sentences.sentence: It would have been difficult to respond to the requests of villagers and other rural inhabitants without the support and understanding of district authorities.
sentences.translation: 没有地区当局的支持和理解，就很难回应村民及其他农村居民的请求。

structure.text: to respond to the requests of villagers and other rural inhabitants
without the support and understanding of district authorities

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，to respond... 是实际内容。
without 引出缺失的条件，表示“没有……就……”。

sentences.sentence: Today, nobody in the district argues about the importance of improved paths and inexpensive means of transport.
sentences.translation: 如今，区内没有人质疑改善小路和廉价交通工具的重要性。

structure.text: the importance of improved paths and inexpensive means of transport

difficult_points: nobody 作主语表示完全否定。
of 后的并列名词说明 importance 所涉及的对象。

sentences.sentence: But this is the result of dedicated work over a long period, particularly from the officers in charge of community development.
sentences.translation: 但这是长期投入工作的结果，尤其要归功于负责社区发展的官员。

structure.text: the result of dedicated work over a long period
particularly from the officers in charge of community development

difficult_points: this 指前句无人质疑的重要性这一现状。
in charge of 后置修饰 officers，表示负责。

sentences.sentence: They played an essential role in raising awareness and interest among the rural communities.
sentences.translation: 他们在提高农村社区的认识和兴趣方面发挥了关键作用。

structure.text: in raising awareness and interest among the rural communities

difficult_points: They 指前句的 officers。
play a role in 后接动名词，表示在……方面发挥作用。

sentences.sentence: The concept of integrated rural transport is now well established in Tanzania, where a major programme of rural transport is just about to start.
sentences.translation: 综合农村运输理念如今已在坦桑尼亚牢固确立，一项重要的农村运输计划即将在那里启动。

structure.text: The concept of integrated rural transport
where a major programme of rural transport is just about to start

difficult_points: be well established 表示已牢固确立。
where 指 Tanzania；be about to 表示即将发生。

sentences.sentence: The experiences from Makete will help in this initiative, and Makete District will act as a reference for future work.
sentences.translation: 马凯特的经验将有助于这项倡议，马凯特区也将成为未来工作的参考。

structure.text: Makete District will act as a reference for future work

difficult_points: will help 表示对未来的作用。
act as 表示“充当、作为”。
